validation.uploadFirst: Please upload a video file first.
validation.noModes: No task plan is available right now. Please contact the administrator.
validation.modeUnavailable: The selected task plan isn't available yet. Please choose another plan.
validation.youtubeInvalid: Only valid YouTube links are supported.

concurrency.blockedHint: Please finish or cancel the current task before creating a new translation.
concurrency.activeHint: You have {count} task(s) in progress; you can still create a new one (limit {limit}).

reuse.title: Convert the video you just previewed to the full version
reuse.body: We'll use the full original video you previewed to generate the final result — no need to re-upload. Choose a plan below and create at the normal per-tier charge.

upload.merging: Merging and verifying… (large files take tens of seconds, please don't close the page)

express.name: Express
express.desc: Fully automated — AI identifies speakers, translates, and dubs, with no manual steps.

free.name: Free
free.desc: Free original-voice AI dubbing (limited time), once per day, ≤10 min per clip, watermarked output.

studio.name: Studio
studio.desc: Review translations and clone the original voice for higher-quality, customized dubbing.

smart.name: Smart
smart.desc: Flat 100 credits/min; AI auto-reviews translations and auto-clones the voice, with no manual steps.
smart.previewDesc: Clone the main speaker's voice and watch a watermarked 3-minute preview first (pre-charge {cost}). If you're happy, convert to the full version, charged per minute as usual.

pricing.title: Charging
pricing.free: Free mode isn't charged right now (free for a limited time) and keeps original-voice AI dubbing. Once per day, ≤10 min per clip, watermarked output. If you later need post-editing or a Jianying draft as paid add-ons, they'll be charged separately.
pricing.express: Express is charged by source video duration, currently {rate}. Credits are pre-charged by the detected duration when you create a task; if your balance is short, creation stops — you can upgrade your plan on the billing page.
pricing.smart: Smart is charged by source video duration, currently a base rate of {rate}. AI auto-reviews translations and handles the main speaker's voice as needed; if a new auto-clone is required, an extra {cloneCost} is pre-charged and released if no new clone happens. Current-phase limits: up to 3 main speakers; if the conditions aren't met, it auto-downgrades to Studio or refunds.
pricing.studio: Studio is charged by source video duration, with a base rate of {rate}; higher / flagship audio quality is then charged at {high} / {flagship} credits/min respectively. Voice cloning is a separate one-time charge, and the clone dialog confirms the cost again.

smartPause.title: Weak-match confirmation mode is on
smartPause.body: The administrator has enabled the "weak-match confirmation" policy: if the system finds a possibly matching voice in your personal voice library (but the similarity isn't strong enough), the task pauses at the voice-review page for you to confirm whether to reuse it before continuing. Reusing a personal voice doesn't consume clone credits; if you'd rather not reuse it, you can pick an official voice or clone again.

footnote: Express completes the whole flow automatically with no manual steps. Studio lets you review translations and clone the original voice.

duration.fallbackOverMax: This video is longer than your highest plan allows. Please use a shorter video, or contact support.
duration.fallbackUpgrade: This video is longer than your current plan allows; upgrade your plan to process longer videos.

toast.previewExpired: This preview can no longer be converted to full (it may have expired). Please re-upload a video to create one.
toast.stillActive: You have an unfinished task. Please finish or cancel it before creating a new translation.
